_fixture_meta.describes: A node envelope carrying a v0.1 non-feature: an unrecognized 'agents_only' boolean and an 'no_train' boolean. PRD-109-R22 (rationale per gap F4) explicitly excludes per-node agents-only / no-train flags from v0.1; sites SHOULD use robots.txt + the Content-Signal HTTP header (out of band) instead. PRD-108-R7's forward-compat rule (consumers tolerate unknown optional fields) means a Core consumer will not reject this envelope, but PRD-600 MUST emit a warning flagging both fields as v0.1 non-features and reminding the producer that per-node access flags are NOT part of the spec contract and MUST NOT be relied upon as a control.
_fixture_meta.rejection_reason: agents_only and no_train are v0.1 non-features per PRD-109-R22; producers SHOULD NOT emit them. Consumers MUST NOT treat them as binding access control. Detected by PRD-600 as a warning, not a hard schema rejection (PRD-108-R7 makes them tolerated unknown optional fields).

expected_error.missing: Node carries 'agents_only' and 'no_train' fields; v0.1 explicitly defers per-node access flags to robots.txt + Content-Signal. PRD-600 MUST emit a warning per PRD-109-R22; the envelope itself is wire-format-legal.

envelope.title: Internal Proprietary Roadmap
envelope.summary: Confidential roadmap for fiscal year planning.
